title: Lopez: A solemn promise: AI didn’t write this column
description: Exploring the pros and cons of artificial intelligence for writing.
content:
For quite a while now, someone has been living inside my computer, writing emails for me.
I don’t recall signing up for this artificial intelligence feature, which is like having a word valet. It’s in my phone, too, which offers three serviceable but... [6039 chars]

title: Netanyahu had to prove he was alive 3 times. Why proof of life is ‘Word of the Week’
description: Amid rumours of his death, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu posted three proof of life videos. However, the visuals were dismissed as artificial intelligence, meant to deceive the world about the leader’s well-being

title: Are AI models becoming commodities? OpenClaw’s ChatGPT-like growth sparks debate
description: OpenClaw’s rapid ChatGPT-like growth has sparked a debate in the tech industry about whether AI models are becoming commoditized, raising questions about the future value and differentiation of artificial intelligence technologies.
content: OpenClaw, which has gained sudden popularity after getting a shout-out from NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang at the GTC annual conference for being the next ChatGPT. “This is definitely the next ChatGPT,” Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang told CNBC’s Jim Cramer on the ... [2160 chars]

title: Women billionaires double in 10 years: Hurun report reveals USD 470 billion wealth boom
description: This sharp rise is being driven by sectors such as artificial intelligence, healthcare, and advanced manufacturing, where women entrepreneurs are building and scaling large businesses.
content:
New Delhi: The number of self-made women billionaires worldwide has reached a record 150 in 2026—double the figure from a decade ago—while their combined wealth has surged to USD 470 billion, according to the latest Hurun report.
